records.m_Talk_ENG: Arrived... at the last location in Sector 2.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arrived... at the last location in Sector 2.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arrived... at the last location in Sector 2.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Sis's house.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Sis's house.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Sis's house.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just rubble now, nothing more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just rubble now, nothing more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just rubble now, nothing more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a saying that a criminal always returns to the scene of the crime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a saying that a criminal always returns to the scene of the crime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a saying that a criminal always returns to the scene of the crime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll see if that applies to a C.O. too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll see if that applies to a C.O. too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll see if that applies to a C.O. too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A small trace of Corruption ray is being detected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A small trace of Corruption ray is being detected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A small trace of Corruption ray is being detected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could it be a C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could it be a C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could it be a C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The strength is weak for it to be a C.O. It's likely because of the Corruption virus attached to this large plant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The strength is weak for it to be a C.O. It's likely because of the Corruption virus attached to this large plant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The strength is weak for it to be a C.O. It's likely because of the Corruption virus attached to this large plant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The leaves have withered while still attached.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The leaves have withered while still attached.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The leaves have withered while still attached.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it was just a lack of water, the leaves would have fallen first...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it was just a lack of water, the leaves would have fallen first...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it was just a lack of water, the leaves would have fallen first...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a nutrition issue. The unique nature of the Corruption steals the life force from the living.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a nutrition issue. The unique nature of the Corruption steals the life force from the living.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a nutrition issue. The unique nature of the Corruption steals the life force from the living.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could it be that this C.O. needs... something other than life force?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could it be that this C.O. needs... something other than life force?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could it be that this C.O. needs... something other than life force?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are no such Irregulars. At least, none up until now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are no such Irregulars. At least, none up until now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are no such Irregulars. At least, none up until now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At first, I thought that C.O. was the root of all the incidents.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At first, I thought that C.O. was the root of all the incidents.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At first, I thought that C.O. was the root of all the incidents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if we assume the mass slaughter at the construction site wasn't her doing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if we assume the mass slaughter at the construction site wasn't her doing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if we assume the mass slaughter at the construction site wasn't her doing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her targets have all been Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her targets have all been Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her targets have all been Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could the C.O. have had some kind of motive for targeting only Counters?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could the C.O. have had some kind of motive for targeting only Counters?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could the C.O. have had some kind of motive for targeting only Counters?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It must be the CRF.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It must be the CRF.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It must be the CRF.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The CRF loss in patients affected by the Corruption virus wasn't simply due to Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The CRF loss in patients affected by the Corruption virus wasn't simply due to Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The CRF loss in patients affected by the Corruption virus wasn't simply due to Corruption rays.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The virus has been absorbing the CRF.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The virus has been absorbing the CRF.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The virus has been absorbing the CRF.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
A C.O. absorbing the CRF from Counters... That's quite fascinating
8g I mean, horrifying.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
A C.O. absorbing the CRF from Counters... That's quite fascinating
8g I mean, horrifying.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
A C.O. absorbing the CRF from Counters... That's quite fascinating
8g I mean, horrifying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's something even Shadows can't do... Could she be a variant of an Eater?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's something even Shadows can't do... Could she be a variant of an Eater?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's something even Shadows can't do... Could she be a variant of an Eater?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just a hypothesis, but if we assume the target is an Irregular, it seems plausible enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just a hypothesis, but if we assume the target is an Irregular, it seems plausible enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just a hypothesis, but if we assume the target is an Irregular, it seems plausible enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means the C.O.'s next target will also be a Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That means the C.O.'s next target will also be a Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That means the C.O.'s next target will also be a Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But compared to before, when accidents happened every few minutes, things have been quiet now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But compared to before, when accidents happened every few minutes, things have been quiet now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But compared to before, when accidents happened every few minutes, things have been quiet now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe she's hiding because she feels threatened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe she's hiding because she feels threatened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe she's hiding because she feels threatened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why did it suddenly get dark?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why did it suddenly get dark?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why did it suddenly get dark?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the streetlights are off. Is it a power outage?
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the streetlights are off. Is it a power outage?
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the streetlights are off. Is it a power outage?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, be careful. We don't know where the attack might come from.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, be careful. We don't know where the attack might come from.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, be careful. We don't know where the attack might come from.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did the lights suddenly go out? Did the power plant staff evacuate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did the lights suddenly go out? Did the power plant staff evacuate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did the lights suddenly go out? Did the power plant staff evacuate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be. The plant is managed by AI.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be. The plant is managed by AI.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be. The plant is managed by AI.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought it would be over quickly with just one C.O., but it's dragging on until nightfall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought it would be over quickly with just one C.O., but it's dragging on until nightfall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought it would be over quickly with just one C.O., but it's dragging on until nightfall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, bringing night vision goggles was a good call.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, bringing night vision goggles was a good call.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, bringing night vision goggles was a good call.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing? Let's head back and link up with the main effort.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing? Let's head back and link up with the main effort.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing? Let's head back and link up with the main effort.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought... I just saw something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought... I just saw something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought... I just saw something.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Don't mess around. We've already completed the reconnaissance, so what are you talking abou
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Don't mess around. We've already completed the reconnaissance, so what are you talking abou
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Don't mess around. We've already completed the reconnaissance, so what are you talking abou
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see it! It's over there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see it! It's over there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see it! It's over there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean? Where...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean? Where...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean? Where...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Munch!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Munch!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Munch!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm almost an adult now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm almost an adult now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm almost an adult now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll find more tasty stuff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll find more tasty stuff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll find more tasty stuff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heek...! Stay back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heek...! Stay back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heek...! Stay back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-aaah!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-aaah!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-aaah!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The target this time was also a Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The target this time was also a Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The target this time was also a Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She boldly targeted a TASKFORCE member in the middle of the search.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She boldly targeted a TASKFORCE member in the middle of the search.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She boldly targeted a TASKFORCE member in the middle of the search.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the fact that it took place at a power plant means... that she caused the power outage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the fact that it took place at a power plant means... that she caused the power outage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the fact that it took place at a power plant means... that she caused the power outage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike humans, C.O.s don't wander in the dark, so she used that to her advantage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike humans, C.O.s don't wander in the dark, so she used that to her advantage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike humans, C.O.s don't wander in the dark, so she used that to her advantage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knowing the opponent's weakness and using one's own advantage... This is becoming a real headache.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knowing the opponent's weakness and using one's own advantage... This is becoming a real headache.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knowing the opponent's weakness and using one's own advantage... This is becoming a real headache.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that reminds me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that reminds me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that reminds me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That kid said something like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That kid said something like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That kid said something like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said she could understand their thoughts and gain their powers by eating others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said she could understand their thoughts and gain their powers by eating others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said she could understand their thoughts and gain their powers by eating others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe she's stealing from others in that way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe she's stealing from others in that way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe she's stealing from others in that way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Steal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Steal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Steal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she wasn't lying, does that mean she's getting stronger as more victims are added...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she wasn't lying, does that mean she's getting stronger as more victims are added...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she wasn't lying, does that mean she's getting stronger as more victims are added...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a possibility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a possibility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a possibility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first few targets were Grade D petty criminals, but this time she's targeting Grade Bs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first few targets were Grade D petty criminals, but this time she's targeting Grade Bs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first few targets were Grade D petty criminals, but this time she's targeting Grade Bs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Getting stronger, and as she does, she targets stronger opponents...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Getting stronger, and as she does, she targets stronger opponents...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Getting stronger, and as she does, she targets stronger opponents...

records.m_Talk_ENG: To gauge her own level and pick her targets. This isn't typical behavior for a C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To gauge her own level and pick her targets. This isn't typical behavior for a C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To gauge her own level and pick her targets. This isn't typical behavior for a C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Other TASKFORCEs have all finished withdrawing to the outskirts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Other TASKFORCEs have all finished withdrawing to the outskirts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Other TASKFORCEs have all finished withdrawing to the outskirts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only Counters left in this blockaded block are the two of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only Counters left in this blockaded block are the two of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only Counters left in this blockaded block are the two of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what, whether fast or slow, she will eventually show up here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what, whether fast or slow, she will eventually show up here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what, whether fast or slow, she will eventually show up here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey, are you ready?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey, are you ready?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey, are you ready?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. We'll catch her and become the heroes who saved the city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. We'll catch her and become the heroes who saved the city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. We'll catch her and become the heroes who saved the city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heroes... who saved the city!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heroes... who saved the city!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heroes... who saved the city!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that's good to hear. Should we chant while we're at it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that's good to hear. Should we chant while we're at it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that's good to hear. Should we chant while we're at it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A hero's... chant!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A hero's... chant!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A hero's... chant!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're listening, shout the chant with me! That will raise my power, and I can save the city!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're listening, shout the chant with me! That will raise my power, and I can save the city!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're listening, shout the chant with me! That will raise my power, and I can save the city!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Unlimited Force!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Unlimited Force!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Unlimited Force!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Prism Power!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prism Power!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prism Power!!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Unlimi
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Unlimi
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Unlimi
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Did you say something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Did you say something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Did you say something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-nothing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-nothing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-nothing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should hold off on this chant. She will definitely be disappointed and think it's childish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I should hold off on this chant. She will definitely be disappointed and think it's childish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I should hold off on this chant. She will definitely be disappointed and think it's childish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Well...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hurrah?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hip! Hip! Hurrah!

root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, bringing night vision goggles was a good call.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, bringing night vision goggles was a good call.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing? Let's head back and link up with the main effort.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing? Let's head back and link up with the main effort.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing? Let's head back and link up with the main effort.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought... I just saw something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought... I just saw something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought... I just saw something.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Don't mess around. We've already completed the reconnaissance, so what are you talking abou

Don't mess around. We've already completed the reconnaissance, so what are you talking abou

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see it! It's over there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see it! It's over there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see it! It's over there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean? Where...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean? Where...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean? Where...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Munch!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Munch!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Munch!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm almost an adult now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm almost an adult now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm almost an adult now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll find more tasty stuff.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll find more tasty stuff.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll find more tasty stuff.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heek...! Stay back!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heek...! Stay back!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heek...! Stay back!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-aaah!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-aaah!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-aaah!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The target this time was also a Counter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The target this time was also a Counter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The target this time was also a Counter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She boldly targeted a TASKFORCE member in the middle of the search.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She boldly targeted a TASKFORCE member in the middle of the search.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She boldly targeted a TASKFORCE member in the middle of the search.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the fact that it took place at a power plant means... that she caused the power outage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the fact that it took place at a power plant means... that she caused the power outage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the fact that it took place at a power plant means... that she caused the power outage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike humans, C.O.s don't wander in the dark, so she used that to her advantage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike humans, C.O.s don't wander in the dark, so she used that to her advantage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike humans, C.O.s don't wander in the dark, so she used that to her advantage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Knowing the opponent's weakness and using one's own advantage... This is becoming a real headache.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Knowing the opponent's weakness and using one's own advantage... This is becoming a real headache.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Knowing the opponent's weakness and using one's own advantage... This is becoming a real headache.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that reminds me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that reminds me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that reminds me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That kid said something like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That kid said something like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That kid said something like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She said she could understand their thoughts and gain their powers by eating others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She said she could understand their thoughts and gain their powers by eating others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She said she could understand their thoughts and gain their powers by eating others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe she's stealing from others in that way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe she's stealing from others in that way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe she's stealing from others in that way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Steal?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Steal?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Steal?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she wasn't lying, does that mean she's getting stronger as more victims are added...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she wasn't lying, does that mean she's getting stronger as more victims are added...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she wasn't lying, does that mean she's getting stronger as more victims are added...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's a possibility.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's a possibility.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's a possibility.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The first few targets were Grade D petty criminals, but this time she's targeting Grade Bs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The first few targets were Grade D petty criminals, but this time she's targeting Grade Bs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The first few targets were Grade D petty criminals, but this time she's targeting Grade Bs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Getting stronger, and as she does, she targets stronger opponents...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Getting stronger, and as she does, she targets stronger opponents...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Getting stronger, and as she does, she targets stronger opponents...

root.m_Talk_ENG: To gauge her own level and pick her targets. This isn't typical behavior for a C.O.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To gauge her own level and pick her targets. This isn't typical behavior for a C.O.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To gauge her own level and pick her targets. This isn't typical behavior for a C.O.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Other TASKFORCEs have all finished withdrawing to the outskirts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Other TASKFORCEs have all finished withdrawing to the outskirts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Other TASKFORCEs have all finished withdrawing to the outskirts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only Counters left in this blockaded block are the two of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only Counters left in this blockaded block are the two of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only Counters left in this blockaded block are the two of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what, whether fast or slow, she will eventually show up here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what, whether fast or slow, she will eventually show up here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what, whether fast or slow, she will eventually show up here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey, are you ready?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey, are you ready?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey, are you ready?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. We'll catch her and become the heroes who saved the city.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. We'll catch her and become the heroes who saved the city.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. We'll catch her and become the heroes who saved the city.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heroes... who saved the city!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heroes... who saved the city!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heroes... who saved the city!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that's good to hear. Should we chant while we're at it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that's good to hear. Should we chant while we're at it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that's good to hear. Should we chant while we're at it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A hero's... chant!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A hero's... chant!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A hero's... chant!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're listening, shout the chant with me! That will raise my power, and I can save the city!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're listening, shout the chant with me! That will raise my power, and I can save the city!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're listening, shout the chant with me! That will raise my power, and I can save the city!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Unlimited Force!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Unlimited Force!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Unlimited Force!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Prism Power!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Prism Power!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Prism Power!!

root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Did you say something?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Did you say something?

root.m_Talk_DEU: N-nothing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-nothing!

root.m_Talk_FRA: I should hold off on this chant. She will definitely be disappointed and think it's childish.
